// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.TestHandler, global::TestNamespace.TestHandler>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IRequestHandler<global::TestNamespace.TestRequest, string>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) =>
            {
                var s0 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.TestHandler>();
                var s1 = new global::TestNamespace.HandlerDecorator<global::TestNamespace.TestRequest, string>(s0);
                return s1;
            });

            return services;
        }
    }
}
